title: The MegaFaresX Modpack Lite
description: The lite version of MegaFaresX Modpack it has all of the essential mods for Maximum preformance
body:
The MegaFaresX Modpack Lite
Get the Maximum Preformace of you're PC in Minecraft Using the best mods Like Sodium!
So this is basically a Liter Version of [The MegaFaresX Modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mfxpack) It's like the base of My pack from here on out 

also this was created on request of some people to have a "less bloated" ver of the pack with only the Preformace mods!
